name: Portable Floor Lamp Black (Includes LED Light Bulb) - Room Essentials™
description:
Add soft illumination to your indoor space with this Portable Floor Lamp from Room Essentials™. The black floor lamp features a sleek frame with a round base and a bell-shaped shade for a crisp look that blends effortlessly with any decor style or color palette. The non-removable integrated bulb provides a soft glow for everyday use, while the 4-way setting allows you to easily adjust the level of lighting. Place it next to a sofa or alongside the entryway console for functional and aesthetic radiance.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
